name: Gravlox
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half of the fish, skin side down, in a deep glass dish. Spread dill over the fish. Sprinkle dry ingredients evenly over the dill. Top with the matching half of the fish, skin side up.
2. Cover with foil and weigh down with a large board and a five-pound weight (or a heavy book on a platter). Refrigerate for 48 to 72 hours, turning the salmon and basting every twelve hours with the accumulated juices.
3. To serve, remove the fish from the marinade, discard the dill and spices, pat dry. Slice the salmon thinly against the grain and serve.
NOTE: This recipe is adapted from THE SILVER PALATE by Julie Russo and Sheila Lukins. It has been a staple at many holiday gatherings, especially during Thanksgiving in Vermont.
